glossary.definition: First Notice of Loss — the initial report that an incident occurred.
The amount the policyholder pays out of pocket before insurance covers the rest.
Anyone other than the policyholder and Northwind involved in the incident.
How Northwind recovers costs from the at-fault party's insurer after paying a claim.
Coverage for non-collision damage (theft, weather, vandalism).
Coverage for damage from a collision, regardless of fault.
